headline: Jim Cramer on Globus Medical: “There Is Not a Lot of Money to Be Made in This One”
summary: Globus Medical, Inc. (NYSE:GMED) was among the stocks Jim Cramer looked at as he explained the need for a tame bond market for the stock market to go higher. A caller asked for Cramer’s thoughts on the company, and he remarked: Okay, this group in particular, the medical device group, is hated in this market. […]

headline: Boston Scientific Trial Success Adds Weight To SEISMIQ 4CE And BSX Valuation
summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) reported positive pivotal trial results for its SEISMIQ 4CE Coronary Intravascular Lithotripsy Catheter. The FRACTURE trial met all primary safety and effectiveness endpoints in patients with severely calcified coronary artery disease. The company plans to use these data to support a regulatory submission for SEISMIQ 4CE. Boston Scientific is a major player in interventional cardiology, with products focused on treating complex coronary and structural heart...

headline: Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) Fell Due to Weak Results

headline: Abbott's Biosimilar Push to Help Sustain EPD Growth Momentum
summary: ABT's EPD unit posts 9% Q1 sales growth as biosimilars and emerging market demand support its long-term expansion plans.

headline: Baird Maintains Bullish View on Boston Scientific (BSX) Despite Lower Target
summary: With a 5-year average revenue growth rate of 13.52%, Boston Scientific Corporation (NASDAQ:BSX) is included among the 11 Best Long Term US Stocks to Buy Right Now. On May 19, Baird lowered its price recommendation on Boston Scientific Corporation (NASDAQ:BSX) to $75 from $78. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm updated its model […]
